monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Attacks in Lebanon Kill 4,304 Since March
— S3 · Conflict · Beirut, Lebanon · 20m ago. Lebanese Ministry reports 4,304 killed in Israeli attacks since March 2026, providing an updated cumulative death toll.
Israeli Settlers Burn Restaurant Near Ramallah, West Bank

— S3 · Conflict · Ramallah, West Bank, Palestine · 5h ago. Israeli settlers broke into and burned a restaurant near Al-Zaytouna University in the West Bank, stealing money amid escalating attacks on Palestinians.
Houthi Attack Kills 14 Government Troops in Yemen
— S3 · Conflict · Yemen · 7h ago. An attack by Yemen's Houthi rebels resulted in the deaths of 14 government troops, indicating continued kinetic conflict in the region.
